runtime_expectation: Extract this archive at repo root so that skills/toy-store-revenue-leak-observatory exists as a normal directory on disk, and make the required source and support tables available in Databricks under chris_demos.demos.
notes: This skill bundle assumes the Maven Fuzzy Factory source tables and support tables are available in Databricks under chris_demos.demos.
The bundle intentionally improves on the supplied sample skill by using repo-root extractable paths, machine-readable support tables, and a Databricks-native IR.
